_comment: This file controls how the app works. Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.
_dropbox_root_comment: The top-level folder in your Dropbox where all project folders live. Must start with /
_monday_subdomain_comment: Your Monday.com subdomain (the part before .monday.com in your URL).

YOUR_BOARD_ID._comment: Replace YOUR_BOARD_ID with the numeric ID from your Monday.com board URL
YOUR_BOARD_ID.name: Your Board Name
YOUR_BOARD_ID._media_type_comment: Used as a folder name in the path. e.g. 'Video' or 'Image'
YOUR_BOARD_ID._dropbox_link_column_comment: Monday.com column ID where the Dropbox link will be written. Find it in your board's column settings.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._status_column_comment: Monday.com column ID for task status.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._completed_labels_comment: Tasks with these status labels are hidden from the missing-links list.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._approved_label_comment: When a task's status changes to this label, a Dropbox folder is automatically created.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._columns_comment: Map each folder-path variable to its Monday.com column ID. Find column IDs in your board settings.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._bundle_keywords_comment: If a task name contains any of these words, it's treated as a bundle (multiple products).
YOUR_BOARD_ID._other_keywords_comment: Tasks matching these keywords are flagged as non-standard and won't get auto folders.
YOUR_BOARD_ID._fallback_values_comment: Used when a column value is blank. Set to empty string '' to skip that folder level.

YOUR_DEPARTMENT_LABEL._dropbox_folder_comment: The folder inside dropbox_root where this department's files go.
YOUR_DEPARTMENT_LABEL._path_template_comment: Ordered list of folder levels. Available values: dept_folder, category, product, media_type, platform, date, task_name

YOUR_BOARD_ID._department_rules_comment: Add one entry per department label. The label must exactly match what appears in Monday.com.
